etymology.description: Depicts an upside down human figure, 大(大) (dà, "big") inverted -> emphasizes an opposing or backward orientation -> original form of 逆(逆) (nì, "to oppose")
etymology.interpretation: 屰(nì) represents the concept of 'opposite' or 'backwards' by visually depicting a person in an inverted position, which intuitively conveys reversal or opposition.
